HGSS.636.0001:
Sorry? I’m afraid I can’t hear you very
well. Must be a bad connection.\f
Can you call again from somewhere else?
HGSS.636.0002:
Hello, hello, hello...
Oh, hello, what are you up to?\r
I’m just fine, thanks!\f
HGSS.636.0003:
Many of the Gym Leaders are much
stronger than I am. We’ve just got to\r
work harder!
HGSS.636.0004:
My schedule’s fairly open on Monday
afternoons. Would you mind calling\r
me back then?
HGSS.636.0005:
I can hear you clearly now.
Say, my schedule just opened up.\r
Would you like to meet for\r
a battle or something? [0200,0000]
HGSS.636.0006:
Super!
I’m burning up, ready to fight!\f
I’ll be waiting for you at the
Fighting Dojo in Saffron City!
HGSS.636.0007:
Oh, I getcha...
You’re afraid to face me...\r
Nah, that’s not true, right?
HGSS.636.0008:
You’re sure you want to meet me for
a battle?\f
Don’t you have kind of a full schedule,
with other appointments?
HGSS.636.0009:
I’m waiting for you at the Fighting Dojo
in Saffron City!\r
Come on! Move like the wind!
HGSS.636.0010:
This is Janine.
How are you doing?\f
HGSS.636.0011:
Remember, you promised to meet me at
the Fighting Dojo in Saffron City.\r
I’m ready whenever you are...like, now!
HGSS.636.0012:
Hey, can I talk to you about my dad?
Only if you want to hear, though.\f
Seriously? I might talk your ear off
if I’m not careful!
HGSS.636.0013:
See, I’ve been training with my dad
since I was little--to be a Gym Leader.\f
I haven’t even considered taking any
other path, really.\f
It’s my dream to someday become a
better Gym Leader than Dad!
HGSS.636.0014:
Falkner in Violet City...
He’s talking about his dad all the time!\f
Seriously, he’s such a daddy’s boy,
he needs to become his own person\r
sometime, you know?\f
What do you mean, I should talk?\r
Ha ha--mind your own business!
